items.title: Bitcoin outperforms stocks, tops $72,000 even as dollar strengthens
items.summary: BTC climbed 2% to break through $72,000 while U.S. equity futures slipped and the dollar strengthened, as altcoins and AI tokens joined a broader crypto rally.
